duplicate_profile_entity_error: parse failed: profile_entity_ids must not contain duplicates: entity.line.a
degenerate_line_error: parse failed: line entity.line.degenerate start/end points must differ
unknown_entity_error: parse failed: profile references unknown sketch entity entity.line.missing
unsolved_constraint_error: evaluation failed: sketch profile profile.valid.unsolved has unsolved constraints; conversion blocked
parity_contracts: profile conversion rejects duplicate entity ids and degenerate line segments deterministically
open profiles emit deterministic CAD-WARN-NON-MANIFOLD warnings
unknown-entity and unsolved-constraint inputs fail conversion deterministically
